one_time_description: Share of earnings from First Nation business partnerships accounted for by modified equity method; audit qualification issued as financial information was not available for all partnerships for year ended March 31, 2022
economic_notes: First Nation holds equity interests in multiple business partnerships including WDLP (33.33%), TND (33.33%), MREDLP (12.5%), WPF (20%), NSFNI (33.33%), and Opeewin LP (33.33%). Wholly owns 2507503 Ontario Inc as a capital asset holding company. Operates a Gas Bar and Chapleau Cree Garage. Received dividends of $1,029,133 from business enterprises.
notes: Audit was qualified because financial information for First Nation business partnerships was not available for year ended March 31, 2022 (except NSFNI LP); as a result investment balances and share of earnings could not be fully verified. Fiscal year is 2022 not 2024. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($4,274,830) + CMHC ($2,425,432) + Ministry of Health ($162,293) = $6,862,555. OSR calculated as total revenue ($16,580,467) minus government transfers ($6,862,555) = $9,717,912 (includes Gas Bar, Goldcorp, OFNLP, Other, realized gain/loss, and share of partnership earnings). Accumulated surplus per note 12 is $27,099,066 which differs from statement of operations figure of $26,700,611 due to accumulated remeasurement gains of $398,455. Remuneration schedule referenced in cover letter but not included in the provided text. Balance sheet line items for accounts receivable and current liabilities not fully detailed in provided text.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
